definition:
1. of Place, near together , (Thucydides), etc.; ς. ἀλλήλων or ἀλλήλοις (Aristotle Philosopher):—; τὸ ς. nearness, proximity , (Aristotle Philosopher) 
2. of Time, (Aristotle Philosopher) 
3. of Quality, οἱ ς. persons of similar rank , (Aristotle Philosopher); ἡ ς. αἰτία the proximate  cause, (Aristotle Philosopher) (ML)
